text:
playframework-2.3.4
Name           : playframework
Version        : 2.3.4
Installed on   : Wed Sep 10 15:47:57 CEST 2014
Origin         : devel/playframework
Architecture   : freebsd:10:x86:32
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : java devel
Licenses       : APACHE20
Maintainer     : hsn@sendmail.cz
WWW            : http://www.playframework.com/
Comment        : Rapid development framework for Java and Scala
Flat size      : 394MiB
Description    :
Play Framework makes it easy to build web applications with Java & Scala.
Play is based on a lightweight, stateless, web-friendly architecture.

Built on Akka, Play provides predictable and minimal resource consumption (CPU,
memory, threads) for highly-scalable applications.

WWW: http://www.playframework.com/
